__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Jupiter and Thetis,Torlonia Marble Caryatid,Dancers on Stage
|rank=orange
|amount=3
|category=self
|description=Per 3 CIV Relics awakened, Snail Bedrock Power +8; CIV Relics Awakened: 180/180
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:Bedrock Power Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by CIV Relics]]
